long_description:
Created from incident source: Parent Incident
Parent incident id: INC10506485
Parent incident caller: TIP.SA
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
[COM] Insufficient running pods for deployment is Triggered

TIP Runbook URL: https://pages.github.ibm.com/cloudlab/internal-docs/deployment-pods-not-running.html
TIP Situation: Deployment pod is down
TIP Short Description: Some vm-migration-controller pods are not running in mzone7a7 for the past 10 minutes
TIP Console: toc
TIP CRN: crn:v1:::is-genctl:::mzone7a7:microservice:vm-migration-controller

Event Generated:

Severity:         High
Metric:
    kube_deployment_spec_replicas = 1
    kube_pod_sysdig_status_ready = 0
Segment:
    kube_cluster_name = 'mzone7a7' and kube_deployment_name = 'vm-migration-controller'
Scope:
    kube_namespace_name in ('genctl', 'rias')
    kube_deployment_name in ('capacity-pool-controller', 'vm-instance-controller', 'compute-action-controller', 'virtual-disk-controller', 'virtual-nic-controller', 'vm-migration-controller', 'vm-scheduler', 'compute-node-controller', 'placement-group-controller', 'local-disk-controller', 'pci-device-controller', 'bm-server-controller', 'bm-server-manager', 'server-node-controller', 'server-scheduler', 'regional-extension-server', 'genctl-extension-server')

Time:             12/08/2025 07:40 PM UTC
State:            Triggered
Notification URL: https://eu-gb.monitoring.cloud.ibm.com:443/api/oauth/openid/IBM/2c4a1985f9d5c10bd4842d2d3989088e/9fbd529a-08ab-44f3-996b-830bea371a5b?redirectRoute=%2Fevents%2Fnotifications%2Fl%3A2419200%2F26781409%2Fdetails

------

Triggered by Alert:

Name:         [COM] Insufficient running pods for deployment
Description:  Some replica pods in the deployment is not running for the past 10 minutes
Team:         Monitor Operations
Scope:
    kube_namespace_name in ('genctl', 'rias')
    kube_deployment_name in ('capacity-pool-controller', 'vm-instance-controller', 'compute-action-controller', 'virtual-disk-controller', 'virtual-nic-controller', 'vm-migration-controller', 'vm-scheduler', 'compute-node-controller', 'placement-group-controller', 'local-disk-controller', 'pci-d
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Pods came up slowly trigerring alerts to CSRE
